title: JWE Decrypt Configuration
description: Configuration for the JWE Decrypt extension. Decrypts JWE tokens and recovers the inner JWT for Envoy to process.

private_key.description: PKCS8 private key used for JWE decryption.

input_header.description: Request header containing the JWE token. Defaults to "Authorization".

prefix.description: Prefix to strip from the header value before decryption (e.g. "Bearer ").

output_header.description: Request header where the decrypted JWT payload is placed.

output_metadata.description: Envoy dynamic metadata location for the decrypted JWT payload. Namespace defaults to "jwe-decrypt".

DataSource.description: A data source provided either inline or as a file path. Exactly one must be set.

inline.description: Data provided directly as a string.

file.description: Path to a file containing the data.

MetadataKey.description: Identifies a location in Envoy dynamic metadata.

namespace.description: Filter-state namespace for the metadata entry.
